title: The Alchemist
author: Paulo Coelho
description: A journey of a shepherd boy who dreams of finding treasure and discovers life's true meaning.

title: Atomic Habits
author: James Clear
description: A guide to building good habits and breaking bad ones through small changes.

title: A Brief History of Time
author: Stephen Hawking
description: Explores cosmology, black holes, and the universe in simple terms.

title: Clean Code
author: Robert C. Martin
description: Best practices for writing clean, maintainable software code.

title: The Theory of Everything
author: Stephen Hawking
description: A look into the origins and structure of the universe.

title: Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone
author: J.K. Rowling
description: A young wizard discovers his magical destiny at Hogwarts.

title: You Don't Know JS
author: Kyle Simpson
description: Deep dive into JavaScript core concepts and behavior.

title: The Martian
author: Andy Weir
description: An astronaut survives alone on Mars using science and engineering.

title: The Great Gatsby
author: F. Scott Fitzgerald
description: A tragic story of love, wealth, and ambition in the Jazz Age.

title: Python Crash Course
author: Eric Matthes
description: A beginner-friendly guide to learning Python programming.

title: Cosmos
author: Carl Sagan
description: A journey through space, time, and human understanding of the universe.

title: The Hobbit
author: J.R.R. Tolkien
description: A fantasy adventure of Bilbo Baggins and his unexpected journey.
